# Ondernemers van de Kamp

Ondernemers van de Kamp is a local guide to businesses, shops, restaurants, makers and entrepreneurs in the Kamp area of Amersfoort, Netherlands.

Important pages:
- / — overview of all businesses
- /loop-de-kamp — walking route through De Kamp
- /categorie/eten-drinken — food and restaurants
- /categorie/winkels-makers — shops and makers
- /over-de-kamp — background about the area

The site uses business-submitted and publicly available business information. Owner portraits are only published with permission.
